name: fox-ecom-example
description: Fox eCommerce SDK Example App - Demonstrates all SDK features

scripts.ios-build: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace FoxEcomExample.xcworkspace -scheme FoxEcomExample -configuration Release -derivedDataPath build
scripts.ios-release: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace FoxEcomExample.xcworkspace -scheme FoxEcomExample -configuration Release -derivedDataPath build | xcpretty
scripts.build: npm run android-build && npm run ios-build
scripts.clean-ios: cd ios && rm -rf build && rm -rf Pods && rm -rf Podfile.lock
scripts.clean-all: npm run clean-android && npm run clean-ios && npm run clean
